data.title: Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Sees Surge in Outpatient Visits Amid Cost-Effective Service Expansion
data.description:
Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Co ( (HK:2120) ) has shared an update.

Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Co., Ltd. reported a significant increase in outpatient visits by 40.6% for the nine months ended September 30, 2025, compared to the same period in 2024. This growth is attributed to the expansion of lower-priced online healthcare services and a restructuring of medical service offerings. Despite the increase in patient visits, the company experienced a notable decrease in average spending per visit and per inpatient bed-day, reflecting a strategic shift towards more cost-effective healthcare solutions. The announcement highlights the company’s efforts to optimize its service mix and expand its market reach through digital healthcare initiatives.

More about Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Co

Wenzhou Kangning Hospital Co., Ltd. operates in the healthcare industry, focusing on providing inpatient and outpatient services through its owned hospitals. The company is involved in offering treatment, general healthcare services, and pharmaceutical sales, with a particular emphasis on expanding online healthcare services.

data.title: Raffles Interior’s Cash Offer by Han Vision Concludes with Minimal Uptake
data.description:
Raffles Interior Ltd. ( (HK:1376) ) has shared an update.

Raffles Interior Limited, a company listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, recently concluded a mandatory unconditional cash offer made by Han Vision Holdings Limited to acquire all issued shares and outstanding convertible notes not already owned by Han Vision. The offer closed on October 2, 2025, without any revisions or extensions. The results showed minimal acceptance, with only 456,000 shares tendered, representing a mere 0.046% of the company’s total issued share capital. Consequently, Han Vision’s stake in Raffles Interior increased slightly to 51.0%. The settlement process for the cash consideration is underway, with remittances expected to be dispatched by October 14, 2025.

data.title: XPeng Inc. Achieves Record EV Deliveries and Maintains Top ESG Rating
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from XPeng, Inc. Class A ( (HK:9868) ).

XPeng Inc. reported a significant increase in vehicle deliveries for September and the third quarter of 2025, with a record 41,581 Smart EVs delivered in September, marking a 95% year-over-year increase. The company also achieved a 149% year-over-year increase in deliveries for the third quarter, reaching 116,007 units. Additionally, XPeng’s P7 model became the fastest to achieve 40 jobs per hour on a new production line, and the company maintained its AAA MSCI ESG Rating for the third consecutive year. These achievements highlight XPeng’s strong operational performance and its leading position in the global automotive industry.
